description: Create validation formulas in the fiction manuscript scene breakdown to detect character location conflicts, missing POV characters, and timeline contradictions. Save the updated file to ~/Documents/scene_breakdown.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with 45 scenes from a mystery novel. Create validation formulas to detect: (1) characters appearing in multiple locations at the same time, (2) POV characters not listed in the Characters Present column, and (3) timeline going backward within the same chapter (excluding flashbacks). Highlight conflicts and create a summary of total conflicts found.
